I hope we can continue with the call.

segments.text: Kindly note that the replies in the information provided by you on this call relating to your health and habits will be considered as a part of your application for insurance and if the proposal is accepted, it shall form the basis of legal contract of insurance between you and Tata AIA Life Insurance.
